Yaml

---
title: "Chapter 20: Test References Vignette"
author: "Kjell Nygren"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
bibliography: REFERENCES.bib
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Chapter 20: Test References Vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

This is a test of the citation

The @Nygren2006 paper is foundational

```{r}
getwd()
list.files()
file.exists("REFERENCES.bib")
```

# References
